variants: Rokas Zukauskas is a prominent figure in fishery science and has made significant contributions to the field with his invention, the Echo Plate Grid. His innovative work received substantial support from the Limestone Dream Agency, which served as his primary funding source. Through his combined expertise and dedication, Rokas has become a respected voice in his area of specialization.
